purpose: Track real people/concepts already covered to prevent duplicates and ensure variety

stories.storyConcept: Immigrant child chooses creative career over parents' traditional expectations
stories.themeCategory: Cultural Bridge - Traditions vs Modern Life
stories.specificSubject: Career choice pressure, generational conflict, honoring sacrifices while following dreams
stories.notes: Composite from 3 sources (Greek-American, various Asian-American, Salvadoran-American), generic character Jin

stories.storyConcept: Mother loses son, finds purpose by helping other children
stories.specificSubject: Grief transformation, loss of child, creating nonprofit to help others
stories.notes: Composite from 4 sources (Kate Braestrup, Scarlett Lewis, Leslie Morissette, Michelle Schwartzmier), generic characters Anna/Ethan

stories.storyConcept: Single parent raising children alone while building new life through education
stories.themeCategory: Single Parent Rising - Building New Life
stories.specificSubject: Single parent overcoming obstacles, education journey, children as motivation, building new life
stories.notes: Composite from 3 sources (Ieshia Champs, Wayne Toh, Stephanie Land), generic characters Lisa/James/Emily/Noah

stories.storyConcept: Single parent overcoming diverse obstacles (domestic violence, homelessness, business building) while raising children alone
stories.specificSubject: Single parent overcoming domestic violence, homelessness, building business, being seen, diverse obstacles beyond education
stories.notes: Composite from 5 sources (8 distinct narratives: Cassie Washington, Maryanne Lundy, Romona Bravo, Meshell Whyte, Shaquan Hoke, Sarah Keast, Kristy Carruthers, Mimi G Ford), generic characters Isabella/Gabriel/Olivia

stories.storyConcept: Person achieves dreams and starts over at older age (swimming at 64, college graduation at 69, bodybuilding at 56)
stories.themeCategory: Age Defiance - Starting Over Later in Life
stories.specificSubject: Starting over later in life, achieving dreams at any age, age defiance, never too late
stories.notes: Composite from 4 sources (Diana Nyad, Ernestine Shepherd, Merrill Cooper, Priscilla Sitienei), generic character Grace

stories.storyConcept: Young person creates positive change in their community through activism, organizing, or leadership (climate action, book diversity, water advocacy)
stories.themeCategory: Youth Activism - Young Person Creating Change
stories.specificSubject: Youth activism, young person making a difference, one person can change the world, voice matters, you don't have to wait to be great
stories.notes: Composite from 3 sources (Greta Thunberg, Marley Dias, Mari Copeny), generic characters Maya, Emma, Sofia

stories.storyConcept: Person faces serious medical crisis (meningitis, cancer) and overcomes through determination, proving impossible possible (lost legs → Paralympic snowboarder, lost lung → Everest climber)
stories.themeCategory: Medical Crisis Overcome - Proving the Impossible Possible
stories.specificSubject: Medical crisis overcome, proving impossible possible, meningitis at 19 with 2% survival, cancer twice at 13/15, lost legs/lung, Paralympic snowboarder, Dancing with Stars, climbing Everest with one lung
stories.notes: Composite from 2 sources (Amy Purdy, Sean Swarner), generic characters Sarah, Jake

stories.storyConcept: Refugee family escapes danger together and rebuilds their life together in new country (not individual journey, not separation/reunion)
stories.themeCategory: Refugee Journey - Family Escape and Rebuilding
stories.specificSubject: Family escape together, 18-month journey through 8 countries, saving child's life, family staying together, rebuilding together
stories.notes: Composite from 3 sources (Hamed Amiri Family, Yulia Rybinska Family, Olexandra Lukashov Family), generic characters Fatima, Ahmed, Omar, Hassan, Yusuf

stories.storyConcept: Person reconnects with cultural roots that were lost, forgotten, or disconnected - rediscovering ancestral heritage, language, customs, or identity
stories.specificSubject: Korean adoptee reconnecting with lost heritage, learning ancestral language, visiting birth country, finding identity and belonging
stories.notes: Composite from 3 sources (Jessica Boling - Korean adoptee, Quartz adoptee story, Adriana Hernández - K'iche' language reclamation), generic character Yuna

stories.storyConcept: Person faces discrimination at work (race, gender, disability, age, etc.) and overcomes barriers through determination, skill, and persistence - breaking barriers and achieving success despite discrimination
stories.specificSubject: Workplace discrimination overcome through determination, proving worth, becoming leader and mentor, fighting for rights and pay equity
stories.notes: Composite from 3 sources (Haben Girma - deafblind Harvard Law, Dr. Cheryl Ingram - 24-year discrimination journey, Myrna Pitaluna-Alngog - construction industry), generic characters Jordan, Marcus, Sarah

specificConceptsCovered: Child language broker in medical context
Career choice pressure from immigrant parents
Cross-cultural/interfaith romantic relationships with family resistance
Grief transformation after loss of child
Single parent raising children alone while building new life through education
Single parent overcoming domestic violence, homelessness, building business, being seen
Starting over later in life, achieving dreams at any age (swimming at 64, college at 69, bodybuilding at 56)
Young person creating positive change through activism (climate action at 15, book diversity campaign at 11, water advocacy at 8)
Medical crisis overcome through determination (meningitis at 19 lost legs → Paralympic snowboarder, cancer twice at 13/15 lost lung → climbed Everest)
Refugee family escape together and rebuild together (18-month journey through 8 countries, saving child's life, family staying together, rebuilding together)
Reconnecting with lost heritage (Korean adoptee learning Korean, visiting birth country, finding identity; K'iche' language reclamation)
Overcoming workplace discrimination (deafblind Harvard Law, 24-year discrimination journey, construction industry gender discrimination - breaking barriers, proving worth, becoming leader)

beforeImplementing: Check if real person is already in 'realPeopleCovered' array
Check if specific concept is already in 'specificConceptsCovered' array
Check 'themeSaturation' - if theme has 3+ stories, consider different theme for variety
If person/concept exists, pick different story
Update this file after implementing new story
varietyGoals: No more than 3 stories per theme before expanding to other themes
Avoid near-duplicate concepts (e.g., 2 stories about blind musicians)
Aim for diverse representation across themes
